# Isnanto Budi Nurrahman — Full-Stack & Mobile Developer

> Isnanto Budi Nurrahman is a Software Engineer and Full-Stack Developer based in Jakarta, Indonesia. He specializes in high-performance SaaS web applications, multi-tenant architectures, insurance technology platforms, and modern mobile applications. His primary tech stack includes Vue.js, Angular, Flutter, Go, TypeScript, and Node.js.

## Key Pages

- `Home -> https://www.isnantobudi.online/`: Portfolio homepage with an overview of skills, projects, and professional experience.
- `TenantMaster Project -> https://www.isnantobudi.online/tenant-master`: A multi-tenant enterprise cloud application with role-based access control and white-label SaaS architecture.
- `Insurance Web -> https://www.isnantobudi.online/insurance-web`: Full-stack web platform for the insurance industry, featuring real-time policy management and claims processing.
- `Insurance Mobile -> https://www.isnantobudi.online/insurance-mobile`: Cross-platform mobile application for insurance agents and customers, built with Flutter.
- `SyncBoard -> https://www.isnantobudi.online/sync-board`: Real-time collaborative task board built with Go (backend) and Next.js (frontend), powered by WebSocket.
- `AjarVisual -> https://www.isnantobudi.online/ajar-visual`: AI-powered educational worksheet generator for teachers, integrating Google Gemini and Hugging Face APIs.

## Core Expertise

- **Frontend**: Vue.js 3, Nuxt 3, Angular 17+, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Go (Fiber), Node.js, Express, REST API, WebSocket
- **Mobile**: Flutter (Android & iOS), cross-platform deployment
- **Database**: PostgreSQL, TiDB, MySQL
- **Architecture**: Multi-tenant SaaS, microservices, real-time collaboration systems
- **AI Integration**: Google Gemini API, Hugging Face Inference API

## Professional Summary

Isnanto Budi Nurrahman has 3+ years of professional software engineering experience specializing in enterprise-grade SaaS platforms and insurance technology in Jakarta, Indonesia. He has delivered 20+ production projects ranging from multi-tenant cloud management systems to AI-powered educational tools and real-time collaboration applications.
